/usr/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -static -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/user/user.ld CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/state.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/graphics.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/cursor.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/surface.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/window.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/menu.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/compositor.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/events.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/input.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/displayd.sys.dir/ipc.cpp.obj -o ../../../displayd.sys  ../../../lib/libviperlibc.a
